sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72498" key="oi)nodote/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνο-δοτέω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τινά,</foreign> <sense id="n72498.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prescribe wine to</tr_> one, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
